pageDesc: Paste online video links to download in batch, then send them straight into subtitle, translation, or dubbing flows

setup.title: Install download engines
setup.desc: Install a download engine to get started: yt-dlp covers YouTube and most international sites, lux excels at Bilibili, Douyin and other Chinese sites. Engines install locally and can be updated here anytime.
setup.busyDownloading: Downloads in progress; update engines after they finish

compose.placeholder:
Paste video links, one per line…
Links are auto-extracted from mixed text like chat logs

review.title: Confirm downloads
review.largePlaylistHint: This playlist has more than 100 items. Download all?

task.handoffDesc: Send the selected videos into the task wizard for subtitles, translation, or dubbing
task.handoffSkipped: {{count}} file(s) no longer exist and were skipped

cookie.title: Site cookie profiles
cookie.description: Import logged-in cookies to download higher resolutions or members/age-restricted content. Cookies are stored per site and only used for that site's downloads.
cookie.pastePlaceholder: Paste raw cookie string, e.g. SESSDATA=xxx; bili_jct=yyy
cookie.errNoYtdlp: Browser extraction requires the yt-dlp engine to be installed
cookie.errBrowserPermission: Can't read browser cookies (system permission). Grant this app Full Disk Access in System Settings → Privacy & Security, then retry; or import a cookies.txt file instead
cookie.errBrowserNotFound: {{browser}} not detected (not installed or no signed-in data). Pick an installed, signed-in browser, or import a cookies.txt file instead
cookie.riskNote: Bulk downloading with account cookies may trigger platform anti-abuse; use with caution
cookie.maybeExpiredHint: The logged-in cookies may have expired
